difficult to align pins / place pins accurately, pins (too) thick mirror (too) thick 0625/62 February/March 2022 MP1 factor: valid factor which may affect rate of temperature rise MP2 apparatus: thermometer and additional apparatus necessary to measure independent variable MP3 method: • measure independent variable • measure temperature (change) and / or time appropriate to procedure • repeat for new value of independent variable MP4 control variable: any significant variable (e.g. volume of water if current is the independent variable) MP5 table: columns, with units, for independent variable and dependent variable MP6 analysis: compare readings in the table to see if change in factor produces change in (rate of) temperature rise, plot (line) graph (with axes specified) MP7 additional point (one from) : 2nd valid control variable stated, at least 5 sets of data taken, repeat each measurement and take average,
